user.title: Temperature Alarm Setup
user.description: Select a temperature sensor to monitor for alarm conditions.

mode.title: Select Monitoring Mode
mode.description: Choose how to monitor the temperature.

data_description.mode: Min Only: Alert when below minimum. Max Only: Alert when above maximum. Min/Max: Alert when outside range.

thresholds.title: Set Temperature Thresholds
thresholds.description: Define the temperature thresholds for the alarm. You can adjust these later via the number entities.

error.invalid_entity: Selected entity is not a valid temperature sensor.
error.min_greater_than_max: Minimum temperature must be less than maximum temperature.

abort.already_configured: This sensor is already configured for temperature alarm monitoring.

error.min_greater_than_max: Minimum temperature must be less than maximum temperature.
